Expire_Info.Expire_Other_Info: 1-month free trial. Subscription: 500 JPY/month or 5000 JPY/year. (Final price depends on the exchange rate.)

English.Char_Desc_80: Monitor your PC system info with style. 1-month free trial included.
English.Char_Desc_250: Ohnuki-san Plus is a smart utility designed for usability and style. It allows you to monitor your PC system information with a sophisticated interface. Features a 1-month free trial for all new users.
English.Char_Desc_450: Ohnuki-san Plus is a high-performance system utility. Experience all features with a 1-month free trial. Subscriptions are processed via Gumroad: approx. $3.50 (500 JPY) monthly or $35.00 (5000 JPY) annually. Please note: The final price in USD may vary slightly due to real-time currency exchange rates from the base price in JPY.
English.Char_Desc_2000:
Check your PC system information at a glance. Ohnuki-san Plus is a smart utility designed for usability and style.
Key features include real-time system monitoring, hardware details, and a sleek UI.
Pricing & Trial: - 1-month free trial for all new users. - Monthly Plan: 500 JPY (Approx. $3.50 USD) - Annual Plan: 5000 JPY (Approx. $35.00 USD)
*Payments are securely processed via Gumroad. *While the base price is set in Japanese Yen (JPY), Gumroad will automatically convert this to your local currency (USD, etc.) at the current exchange rate during checkout.
Developed by chilili kobo, this tool provides a premium experience for system management.
